description: College Nation is an online retail store built on Shopify. It sells college-themed merchandise and exposes storefront browsing pages plus agent-oriented commerce metadata for AI/shopping assistants.
summary: collegenation.com exposes a public storefront HTTP surface for product/collection JSON and an agent-facing UCP MCP endpoint; it also shows an OAuth-protected customer-account resource on myaccount.collegenation.com, but public developer registration/auth mechanics were not documented on the domain.

surfaces.name: Storefront product and collection JSON endpoints
